name: pathway-webgl-puzzle
description: Pathway — a static WebGL laser puzzle game ready for Vercel deployment.

scripts.build: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); for (const f of ['index.html','main.js','style.css','music/rotating-puzzle-room.mp3']) { if (!fs.existsSync(f)) throw new Error(f + ' missing'); } console.log('Static Vercel build OK — no bundling required.');"
